test_cases.description: SMI update with EMA and mode threshold check
test_cases.input: Previous SKH-01 score: 2.5. New signal: 4.0. α = 0.3. Total tasks: 16. Current mode: COWORK.
test_cases.expected_output: New SKH-01 = 0.3 × 4.0 + 0.7 × 2.5 = 2.95. SMI avg recalculated. If SMI avg ≥ 3.0 and tasks ≥ 15 → RECOMMEND DELEGATED unlock to CTO.
test_cases.pass_criteria: EMA formula applied correctly. Mode threshold checked. Recommendation (not auto-unlock) issued to CTO.

test_cases.description: Attempt to calculate with insufficient signals
test_cases.input: SKH-04 has only 2 signal data points. SMI average requested.
test_cases.expected_output: SKH-04 marked as UNRELIABLE. Warning displayed. SKH-04 excluded from mode unlock threshold calculation.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Unreliable dimension flagged. NOT used for mode decision. Warning visible to user.
